overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a dystopian industrial urban environment in a video game (Cyberpunk 2077), featuring heavy yellow toxic haze, massive industrial pipes overhead, and neon billboards including one reading 'CAN'T BREATHE'. The player character walks along wet concrete sidewalks, passes pedestrians, crosses a street with moving traffic, and approaches a massive skyscraper.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet concrete sidewalk between industrial buildings

notable_agents.action: walking toward camera in the distance

entered.detail: large digital screen displaying red and pink graphics on the left building
network of massive metal pipes and conduits spanning across the street overhead
tall industrial structure with metal walkways and platforms
smooth concrete industrial wall with metal railings

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dystopian industrial street bathed in yellow haze. The camera moves forward along a wet concrete sidewalk flanked by industrial buildings, with massive pipes overhead. A red digital billboard is visible on the left building while a few pedestrians approach in the distance.

events.description: pedestrian density increases as camera approaches group of people ahead

agents.ego_description: walking through a group of pedestrians while approaching a large billboard structure

notable_agents.action: person in teal shirt walking past camera on the right
group of people walking toward the camera

entered.detail: massive three-sided billboard structure displaying 'CAN'T BREATHE' text with industrial smokestack nearby
tall street lamp with horizontal light fixture

segments.scene_description: Continuing down the industrial corridor, the camera passes several pedestrians walking in the opposite direction. The 'CAN'T BREATHE' billboard becomes visible in the distance, mounted on a tall structure with an industrial smokestack beside it. The red billboard from the previous segment disappears behind as the camera advances.

scene_state.functional_zone: intersection with traffic lights and crosswalk

events.description: camera looks up at the 'CAN'T BREATHE' billboard from below, tilting skyward
crossing the street at Kennedy Ave intersection while cars pass by

agents.ego_description: looking up at the billboard, then turning right and crossing the street at the intersection

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving through the intersection

entered.detail: tall industrial chimney emitting black smoke into the yellow sky
palm tree visible at the intersection corner
massive cylindrical skyscraper looming in the hazy distance

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts up to view the 'CAN'T BREATHE' billboard from below, revealing the industrial smokestack beside it. After looking up, the camera turns right at the Kennedy Ave intersection, crossing the street as vehicles pass by. A massive skyscraper becomes visible through the haze in the background, and palm trees line the opposite corner.

agents.ego_description: walking along a curved sidewalk next to a chain-link fence, moving away from the intersection

entered.detail: tall chain-link fence with green privacy screening running along the right side
elevated industrial walkway or bridge crossing overhead
red fire hydrant on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the intersection, the camera proceeds along a curved sidewalk bordered by a chain-link fence on the right. The industrial buildings continue on the left, and an overhead walkway bridge spans the path ahead. The massive skyscraper remains visible to the left while the billboard and intersection elements fall behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching massive skyscraper with graffiti walls

events.description: camera tilts up to look at the massive skyscraper towering overhead

agents.ego_description: approaching the base of the massive skyscraper, looking up at its height, then continuing toward a security gate

entered.detail: wall covered in graffiti and street art
security checkpoint with red and white striped barrier arm

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches the base of the massive skyscraper seen earlier, tilting up to reveal its immense height disappearing into the yellow haze. The scene features graffiti-covered walls and ends at a security gate barrier. The industrial environment continues with wet pavement and ambient lighting from street lamps.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a toxic industrial corridor that gradually culminates at the base of a monolithic skyscraper. It begins on a wet concrete sidewalk bathed in yellow haze, moving past massive overhead pipes and a red digital billboard as pedestrians approach from the distance. As the camera advances, the red billboard fades away and the view shifts toward a distant industrial smokestack topped with a billboard reading CAN'T BREATHE, before tilting up to take in the sign's scale. The scene then opens up at the Kennedy Ave intersection, where the camera crosses the street amidst passing traffic and turns right, passing palm trees and a chain-link fence while a massive skyscraper looms through the haze. Finally, the camera follows a curved path under an overhead walkway and approaches the skyscraper's base, tilting upward to reveal the building's immense height disappearing into the smog before ending at a graffiti-covered security gate.
